21110201102222110122011122121210100200000010220 - ASI: 29

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  022 = 0 * 22
  110 = 11 * 0
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0220 = 022 * 0
  2011 = 20 * 11
  2121 = 21 * 21
  21110 = 21 * 110
  22110 = 22 * 110
  010220 = 01 * 0220
  122011 = 12 * 2011
  122121 = 12 * 2121
  200000 = 20 * 0000
  210100 = 21 * 0100
  2011022 = 2011 * 022
  22110122011 = 22110 * 122011
  122121210100 = 122121 * 210100
  200000010220 = 200000 * 010220
  211102011022 = 21110 * 2011022
  21110201102222110122011 = 211102011022 * 22110122011
  122121210100200000010220 = 122121210100 * 200000010220
  21110201102222110122011122121210100200000010220 = 21110201102222110122011 * 122121210100200000010220
